data.title: Bitcoin Tests Critical Breakdown Level as Traders Compare 2025 to the 2021 Cycle
data.description:

source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-tests-critical-breakdown-level-as-traders-compare-2025-to-the-2021-cycle/

data.title: China central bank declares crypto illegal and warns on stablecoins
data.description:
China’s central bank has reiterated its hardline stance against cryptocurrencies and stablecoins, declaring that all “virtual assets” lack legal status.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/china-central-bank-declares-crypto-illegal/

data.title: Indian police issue warnings over wedding invitation phishing links
data.description:
The Indian police have issued warnings about a scam that has been ongoing across the country. According to reports, criminals have figured out another clever way to steal money from unsuspecting users this festive season. They claimed that the bad actors are now exploiting the wedding season to dupe innocent victims on WhatsApp. According to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/indian-police-warn-wedding-phishing-links/

data.title: Indonesia Faces Rp 7.9 Trillion Digital Scam Crisis as AI-Driven Fraud Surges
data.description:
Indonesia is facing a worsening wave of digital scams, with one in four citizens reporting financial losses over the past year. New data from the Financial Services Authority (OJK) shows total public losses reaching Rp 7. 9 trillion (US$474 million) between November 2024 and November 2025, underscoring a national fraud emergency fueled by rapid digital adoption […] The post Indonesia Faces Rp 7
source: https://www.ethnews.com/indonesia-faces-rp-7-9-trillion-digital-scam-crisis-as-ai-driven-fraud-surges/

data.title: House Report Alleges Trump Crypto Empire Enables Foreign Influence
data.description:
House Judiciary Committee released a report on November 24, 2025, accusing President Trump of using his office to build a $11. 6 billion crypto empire through self-dealing.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/trump-crypto-empire-house-report-self-dealing-foreign-influence

data.title: China’s robot frenzy stalls as believers turn cautious on stunning IPOs and stock rallies
data.description:
Investor appetite for China’s robot stocks is drying up fast. After months of viral robot dance videos and ridiculous stock pops, the cracks are finally showing, after China’s National Development and Reform Commission warned on November 20 that the sector is bubbling over with hype and overcrowding. The Solactive China Humanoid Robotics Index had surged by […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/chinas-robot-frenzy-stalls/

data.title: Risk turns reckless as markets rip higher through outages and AI panic
data.description:
Wall Street pushed straight through fear this week as the market surged even while parts of global trading systems went dark, according to Bloomberg. A month packed with stress over speculative excess and stretched AI prices flipped fast into a broad risk rally. Stocks, bonds, Bitcoin, and commodities all moved higher together during Thanksgiving week, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/risk-turns-reckless-in-markets/

data.title: Two South Korean Police Officers Indicted for Aiding $186 Million Crypto Laundering Network
data.description:
South Korean prosecutors have indicted two police officers for allegedly taking bribes to help a criminal organization launder $186 million through illegal cryptocurrency exchange operations. Both officers have been suspended as the investigation expands, marking one of the most serious corruption cases tied to Korea’s growing crypto-crime landscape.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/two-south-korean-police-officers-indicted-for-aiding-186-million-crypto-laundering-network/

data.title: Airlines scramble worldwide as Airbus A320s grounded by urgent software fix
data.description:
Airlines from India to Colombia, from New Zealand to the United States, spent the weekend canceling flights, grounding jets, and scrambling to keep passengers moving. According to a report from Bloomberg, the problem is a software failure inside Airbus A320 jets that regulators said must be fixed before planes take off again. The European Union […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/airbus-a320s-grounded-by-urgent-software-fix/

data.title: 2 cryptocurrencies to reach $50 billion market cap in 2026
data.description:
A growing number of analysts believe that the cryptocurrency market is likely to see more capital inflows in the coming months, with several assets poised to stand out.  To this end, such renewed investor focus could see select altcoins approach a market cap of about $50 billion in 2026. Notably, recent market behaviour suggests that despite volatility across the sector, certain networks are quietly positioning for meaningful upside, supported by shifting liquidity cycles, whale activity, and strengthening sentiment. source: https://finbold.com/2-cryptocurrencies-to-reach-50-billion-market-cap-in-2026-2/

data.title: Bitcoin Hits a Cycle-Defining Support Zone as Whales Face Deepest Losses Since 2022
data.description:
Bitcoin has reached one of the most critical technical levels of the entire cycle, with several major indicators converging at the same moment. After 2. 5 years of climbing within a rising parallel channel, the price is now retesting the channel’s base, a point historically associated with decisive reversals or brutal breakdowns
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-hits-a-cycle-defining-support-zone-as-whales-face-deepest-losses-since-2022/

data.title: 32 Million Upbit Hack: Token Solana to Stars on the Korean Market!
data.description:
Upbit suspends deposits and withdrawals after a hacker attack that embezzled 32 million in Solana tokens, causing heavy premiums in the Korean market.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/hack/32-million-upbit-hack-token-solana-to-stars-on-the-korean-market/

data.title: How Trump’s crypto empire became the center of a new influence economy
data.description:
A new staff report released by House Judiciary Committee Ranking Member Jamie Raskin alleges that President Donald Trump has significantly utilized the presidency to expand his personal wealth through cryptocurrency ventures.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/how-trumps-crypto-empire-became-the-center-of-a-new-influence-economy/
